title: TC-BAT-COLD-001: Cold Start — No Low Battery Notification When Device Has Full Battery (Sync 20)
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 connected, battery at 100%. App fully killed (force-stop via OS settings).
Launch app from cold start.
Observe Home screen immediately upon splash completion.
Navigate to: Device → Battery Info (if available) or observe Home screen battery indicator.
Verify no low battery toast/banner/notification is displayed at any point during cold start.
expected: 🧠 BUG SIGNATURE VALIDATION: No low battery notification appears. Battery indicator shows 100% (or full icon). Actual (If Bug): Low battery notification incorrectly appears during cold start before GATT battery service reports actual level.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-002: Cold Start — Battery Level Sync Timing (GATT Read vs UI Render)
steps: Precondition: Device (Sync 40) at 85% battery. App process killed. Enable ADB logging with filter 'BatteryService|GattBattery|BatteryLevel'.
Launch app from cold start.
Capture logcat timestamp of: (a) app process start, (b) splash screen visible, (c) Home screen rendered, (d) first GATT battery characteristic read response.
Observe battery icon on Home screen during the window between (c) and (d).
expected: 🧠 STATE TRIGGER VALIDATION: Battery icon must remain in a neutral/loading state (or show last known good value) until GATT read completes. Actual (If Bug): App renders a default/stale low-battery state (e.g., 0% or red icon) before GATT read returns 85%, then jumps to correct value — indicating stale cache read.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-003: Cold Start — No Low Battery Notification on Voyager Series (Device Asymmetry)
steps: Precondition: Voyager 5200 connected, battery at 90%. App fully killed.
Launch app from cold start.
Observe Home screen and any system-level or in-app notifications for 10 seconds.
Verify battery level displayed matches 90%.
expected: 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY VALIDATION: No low battery notification appears. Battery shows 90%. Actual (If Bug): Voyager series may exhibit different behavior due to different GATT battery reporting characteristics — low battery notification appears erroneously on cold start despite 90% battery.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-004: Cold Start — No Low Battery Notification on Free 60 (Device Asymmetry)
steps: Precondition: Free 60 earbuds connected, case battery and bud battery both at 80%+. App fully killed.
Launch app from cold start.
Observe Home screen for low battery notifications for either buds or case.
Verify battery levels displayed match actual levels.
expected: 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY VALIDATION: No low battery notification for buds or case. Battery levels show 80%+ correctly. Actual (If Bug): Free 60 reports battery via different characteristic path — stale/cached low battery value appears on cold start for one or both buds.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-005: Cold Start — No Low Battery Notification on Surround 85 (Device Asymmetry)
steps: Precondition: Poly Surround 85 connected, battery at 95%. App fully killed.
Launch app from cold start.
Observe Home screen for low battery notification.
Verify battery level shows 95%.
expected: 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY VALIDATION: No low battery notification. Battery shows 95%. Actual (If Bug): Surround 85 headset battery reporting differs — low battery notification appears erroneously on cold start.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-006: Immediate State Trigger — Change Battery Level Then Cold Start
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 connected, battery at 100%. App running. Disconnect device, drain battery to 15% via usage, reconnect. App fully killed.
Launch app from cold start.
Observe Home screen battery indicator and any notifications.
Verify battery shows 15% (low) and appropriate low battery notification IS displayed.
expected: 🧠 IMMEDIATE STATE TRIGGER: Low battery notification correctly appears when device truly has 15%. This validates the notification logic itself works — the bug is specifically about false positives on cold start with full battery. Actual (If Bug): Notification fails to appear despite genuinely low battery, indicating the cold start path suppresses all battery notifications.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-007: Deep Lifecycle — Cold Start After Phone Reboot
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 connected, battery at 100%. Pairing remembered on phone.
Reboot phone.
After phone boots, do NOT launch any app. Wait 30 seconds.
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app from cold start.
Observe Home screen for low battery notification during first 15 seconds.
expected: 🧠 DEEP LIFECYCLE VALIDATION: No low battery notification appears. Battery shows 100% after Bluetooth reconnection completes. Actual (If Bug): Phone reboot clears any cached battery state, and app defaults to low-battery on cold start before GATT re-read.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-008: Cold Start — Rapid Kill and Relaunch (Race Condition)
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 connected, battery at 100%.
Launch app from cold start.
Within 2 seconds of Home screen appearing, force-kill the app.
Immediately relaunch app (cold start again).
Repeat steps 2-4 five times consecutively.
Observe for any low battery notification during any of the launches.
expected: 🧠 RACE CONDITION VALIDATION: No low battery notification appears on any of the 5 cold start launches. Battery consistently shows 100%. Actual (If Bug): Race condition between process death and GATT service initialization causes intermittent low battery notification on some cold starts.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-009: Splash Screen Interaction — Battery State During Initialization
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 connected, battery at 100%. App fully killed.
Launch app. Observe splash screen carefully.
During splash screen display, capture screenshot or log any battery-related UI elements rendered.
After splash completes and Home screen appears, verify battery level.
Check logcat for 'BatteryState' or 'BatteryInit' entries between splash start and Home screen render.
expected: 🧠 SPLASH INTERACTION VALIDATION: No battery UI elements (including low battery notifications) are rendered during splash screen. Battery state initializes after splash completes. Actual (If Bug): App attempts to render battery state during splash/initialization phase, showing default low-battery value before actual GATT read completes.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-010: Cold Start — Battery Notification Suppression During GATT Handshake Window
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 connected, battery at 100%. App fully killed. Enable Bluetooth HCI snoop log.
Launch app from cold start.
Monitor the time window between: (a) Bluetooth GATT service discovery completion, and (b) first battery level notification/read response.
Observe Home screen battery indicator during this window.
Verify no low battery notification is shown even if battery level is temporarily unknown/unreported.
expected: 🧠 TIMING WINDOW VALIDATION: App suppresses all battery notifications during the GATT handshake window. Battery icon shows neutral/unknown state (e.g., dashed outline or '--%'). Actual (If Bug): App defaults to low-battery notification during this window because no battery level has been reported yet, treating 'unknown' as 'low'.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-011: Cold Start — Multiple Device Types Sequential (Asymmetry Sweep)
steps: Precondition: Have Sync 20, Sync 40, Free 60, Surround 85, Voyager 5200 all charged to 80%+.
For each device: (a) Connect and verify battery >80% in app, (b) Fully kill app, (c) Cold launch app, (d) Observe for low battery notification, (e) Record result.
Repeat the full cycle for all 5 devices.
Compare results across devices.
expected: 🧠 DEVICE ASYMMETRY SWEEP: No low battery notification on any device type. All show correct battery level >80%. Actual (If Bug): One or more device types exhibit the low battery notification bug on cold start due to differences in GATT battery characteristic implementation or connection handshake timing.

title: TC-BAT-COLD-012: Cold Start — Battery Cache Invalidation on Disconnect-Reconnect Cycle
steps: Precondition: Sync 20 at 100%. App running. Note battery shows 100%.
Disconnect Bluetooth from phone settings.
While disconnected, drain device battery to 10% via continuous playback.
Reconnect device to phone.
Without launching app, force-kill app process.
Cold launch app.
Observe battery level and notifications.
expected: 🧠 CACHE INVALIDATION VALIDATION: App shows 10% battery with appropriate low battery notification. Actual (If Bug): App shows stale cached value of 100% (from before disconnect) on cold start, then corrects to 10% after GATT re-read — or worse, shows low battery notification based on stale data incorrectly.
